install_overlay.title: Talon is installing
install_overlay.guidance: Please don't use your keyboard or mouse. You can watch as Talon works.
install_overlay.dry_run_complete: Dry run complete. No system changes were made.
install_overlay.suppress_restart_headless: Suppressing system restart due to headless mode.
install_overlay.suppress_restart_developer: Suppressing system restart due to developer mode.

browser.title: Welcome. Please select your web browser.

review.title: System is ready to debloat. Please review.
review.guidance:
The list on the left shows everything Talon is going to do to your system. If there's something you don't want it to do, you can remove items from the list.

If everything looks good to you, select "Start."
review.no_internet_info: You aren't connected to internet. Talon won't install a browser.
review.no_updates_warning: Update policy won't be configured. Updates may restore bloat and undo some of Talon's settings.
review.nothing_to_do: Cannot start debloat process. Nothing to do.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.warning: Do not touch unless you know what you're doing!

remove_edge_permanently.tooltip: Uninstalls Microsoft Edge, and ensures it doesn't come back. You can always reinstall it yourself if you want. Apps that rely on it (msedgewebview2) will still work.

uninstall_outlook_onedrive.tooltip: Uninstalls the Outlook app and OneDrive, as many people do not use them. You can always reinstall them yourself if you want.

debloat_windows_phase_one.tooltip: Talon uses a popular and well-established tool, WinUtil by ChrisTitusTech, as part of its debloating process. The whole process is automated, so you don't need to do anything. It is not recommended to remove this step.

debloat_windows_phase_two.tooltip: Talon uses a popular and well-established tool, Win11Debloat by Raphire, as part of its debloating process. The whole process is automated, so you don't need to do anything. It is not recommended to remove this step.

registry_tweaks.tooltip: Modifies the Windows Registry to make your desktop look and feel better, including but not limited to changing your taskbar to be left-aligned, setting your theme to dark theme, removing delay in menus, and showing file extensions.

configure_updates.tooltip: In order to prevent Windows updates from reintroducing bloat and undoing the changes made, Talon sets an update policy on your system which results in only receiving security updates, leaving out non-security "feature" updates. It lasts permanently on Windows Pro, but only 365 days on Windows Home.

apply_background.tooltip: To complete the look of a freshly debloated system, Talon sets your desktop background to a custom Raven-branded one. The exact desktop background of choice is configurable in the Advanced settings.

developer_mode.tooltip: When enabled, Talon runs without showing the full-screen install overlay.

edge.tooltip: Edge is not recommended unless necessary for your purposes, as it is very invasive to your privacy and embeds ads.

waterfox.tooltip: Waterfox is recommended over Firefox, but not Brave. It's based on Firefox, but removes tracking and telemetry.

brave.tooltip: Brave is the recommended browser, as it is the closest to Chrome while respecting your privacy.

librewolf.tooltip: LibreWolf is only recommended for tech-savvy users. It is designed for maximum privacy and security, but can be harder to use.

firefox.tooltip: Firefox is not recommended unless necessary for your purposes, as it includes telemetry and sponsored content by default.

Check the log for details.

Failed to restart the system.
Check the log for details.

errors.background_file_missing: Selected image file does not exist.
errors.registry_changes_invalid: Registry changes must be a JSON object or array.

Unsupported OS detected.
This tool requires Windows 11.

Failed to determine Windows version.
This tool requires Windows 11.
errors.incompatible_windows_version:
Incompatible Windows version detected:
    {product_name} (build {build_num})
This tool requires Windows 11.
errors.temp_unwritable:
Talon could not write files to {talon_dir}.
Please free up disk space or check permissions.
errors.no_internet_continue:
No internet connection detected.

Talon can continue without internet. If you proceed now, the browser installation step will be skipped.

Options:
- Connect to the internet and run Talon again to install your browser automatically.
- Or click Continue to proceed without a browser install (you can install a browser later).
errors.no_internet_required:
No internet connection detected.
An active internet connection is required to run Talon in non-headless mode.
